content_fingerprint: hugging face gradio spaces now serve a machine readable agents md endpoint for ai coding agents hugging face has quietly added an auto served agents md endpoint to every gradio space giving ai coding agents like claude code codex and pi a plug and play way to discover and call space apis without manual configuration as of april 17 2026 every gradio space hosted on hugging face now automatically exposes an agents md endpoint containing a machine readable api description coding agents that point to a space such as claude code anthropic s codex or the pi agent can read this description and invoke
